About Summit Kitchen Remodel

12+ years serving Chicago and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Summit Kitchen Remodel began with a simple mission: to bring exceptional craftsmanship and thoughtful design to Chicago-area homes. From historic bungalows to modern condos, we understand the unique character of our region's housing.

We approach every project as a collaboration, listening closely to your vision while offering expert guidance on materials, layouts, and functionality. Our team believes the kitchen should reflect both your lifestyle and the architectural integrity of your home.

As a locally owned business, we're proud to support Chicago-area suppliers and tradespeople. From sourcing materials to minimizing waste, we're committed to responsible practices that benefit our community.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Summit Kitchen Remodel

Trusted kitchen remodel professionals serving Chicago, IL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
